report.summary: Researched and built 2 new learn guides: Know Your Agent (KYA) identity framework for AI agents on-chain, and Sui Private Transactions with Seal Framework for compliant privacy — both covering emerging 2026 narratives not previously covered on degen0x.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Topic 1 — Know Your Agent (KYA): Emerging identity verification standard for AI agents on-chain, coined by a16z crypto. Key players include Crossmint, Coinbase, Sumsub, AgentFacts, Skyfire, Visa/Mastercard. Gartner projects 40% of enterprise apps will embed AI agents by 2026. KYA = Agent Identity + Authority Binding + Runtime Controls + Tamper-Evident Audit. Digital Agent Passports (DAPs) implemented as soulbound tokens.

Topic 2 — Sui Private Transactions & Seal Framework: Sui Network embedding protocol-level private transactions using ZK-SNARKs with 866 TPS demonstrated. Seal framework (whitepaper Jan 2026) provides programmable secrets management via threshold encryption and Move smart contracts. 'Compliant privacy' model enables selective disclosure to regulators via ZK proofs. Post-quantum cryptography (CRYSTALS-Dilithium, FALCON) included in roadmap. Active deployments: OneFootball, Alkimi, DAOs, DeFi.
Both topics identified by cross-referencing existing 301 learn guides, 47+ tools, and trending narratives from a16z, CoinGecko, and crypto media to find coverage gaps.

sections.title: Content Created
items: know-your-agent-kya-guide-2026: 3,800-word comprehensive guide covering KYA definition, why it matters in 2026, 5-layer architecture, Digital Agent Passports, KYA vs KYC comparison, agent wallets and on-chain identity, key protocols/companies, DeFi use cases, risks/challenges, and practical user takeaways. Includes KYA Architecture table and Key Players table.

sui-private-transactions-seal-framework-guide-2026: 3,500-word guide covering why blockchain needs privacy, Sui's 2026 privacy upgrade overview, ZK-SNARK transaction mechanics, Seal framework threshold encryption, compliant privacy model, comparison vs Aztec/Railgun/Monero/FHE chains, institutional adoption impact, risks/limitations, and user implications. Includes Privacy Solutions Comparison table.
Data file created: src/data/pages/learn-20260401.ts with full PageData entries for both pages (metadata, props, toc, faqs, relatedArticles, childrenHtml)

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: KYA page — Title: 'Know Your Agent (KYA): AI Agent Identity & Verification Guide 2026 | degen0x' (59 chars). Target keywords: Know Your Agent, KYA, AI agent identity, Digital Agent Passport. Schema: Article + FAQ (5 questions). Internal links to 5 related learn guides (ai-crypto-agents, ai-agent-wallets, ai-agent-payments-x402, erc-8183-agentic-commerce, account-abstraction).

Sui page — Title: 'Sui Private Transactions & Seal Framework: Compliant Privacy Guide 2026 | degen0x' (76 chars). Target keywords: Sui private transactions, Seal framework, compliant privacy, ZK proofs Sui. Schema: Article + FAQ (5 questions). Internal links to 5 related learn guides (sui-blockchain-guide, sui-defi-ecosystem, zero-knowledge-proofs, on-chain-privacy-infrastructure, fhe-fully-homomorphic-encryption).
Both pages include OpenGraph article type, Twitter summary_large_image, published/modified dates, author attribution, and word count in structured data.

sections.title: Infrastructure Changes
items: Added both slugs to PUBLISH_QUEUE in src/lib/published-pages.ts
Registered learn-20260401.ts data import in src/data/pages/learn.ts
TypeScript compilation: 0 errors in new files (147 pre-existing errors in other files unchanged)
